channel.title: ClamAV on Tzion
channel.description: Recent content in ClamAV on Tzion

item.title: [HITCONCTF-QUALS] Antivirus
item.description: I played HITCON Quals CTF 2024 with merger team World Wide Union. This challenge provided a run.sh and print_flag.cbc file. Content of run.sh is as follow: #!/bin/sh docker run -v /home/ctf/clamav/:/test/ --rm -it clamav/clamav clamscan --bytecode-unsigned -d/test/print_flag.cbc /test/sample.exe Looking at it, this is obviously a bytecode challenge, specifically ClamAV’s bytecode. Setting up ClamAV Below are the commands used to install ClamAV from scratch, please ensure you have ninja installed in prior:
